'''Rini''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Skrilling/Legends|Skrilling]] communications expert and [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] who worked at [[Banvhar Station]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
After the Banvhar station was attacked by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], Rini, along with a group of miners assisted [[Flynn Kybo]], [[B'dard Tone]], and [[Codi Ty]] to hunt down the murderous droid general. However, Rini initially failed in his attempt to crack the code of the Separatists to hear their radio conversations and pinpoint Grievous' position.

Shortly thereafter, Rini sent three probes into Anoat system that should find Grievous location. When it turned out that Grievous was on the moon [[Belsus/Legends|Belsus]], Rini, Stellskard and the three Jedi left with a stolen [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] freighter and set course to the location to free the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiates]] that were held captive by the Separatists.
